name: minions-profile-workspace
description: Your source of truth — verified bio claims, portfolio items, and rate cards
author: Mehdi Nabhani <mehdi@the-mehdi.com> (https://the-mehdi.com)

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @minions-profile/sdk run build && pnpm --filter @minions-profile/cli run build && pnpm --filter minions-profile-docs run build && pnpm --filter minions-profile-blog run build && pnpm --filter minions-profile-web run build
scripts.deploy:blog: pnpm --filter minions-profile-blog run build && netlify deploy --dir apps/blog/dist --prod
scripts.deploy:docs: pnpm --filter minions-profile-docs run build && netlify deploy --dir apps/docs/dist --prod
scripts.deploy:web: pnpm --filter minions-profile-web run build && netlify deploy --dir apps/web/dist --prod
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @minions-profile/sdk run build && pnpm --filter @minions-profile/sdk run lint && pnpm --filter @minions-profile/cli run lint
